Class SbmGrpcService

java.lang.Object
io.sbp.grpc.ServiceGrpc.ServiceImplBase
io.sbm.api.impl.SbmGrpcService
All Implemented Interfaces:
io.grpc.BindableService, io.sbp.grpc.ServiceGrpc.AsyncService
public final class SbmGrpcService extends io.sbp.grpc.ServiceGrpc.ServiceImplBase
gRPC service implementation for SBM.

Exposes RPCs for clients to: - query SBP version and compatibility, - obtain server configuration, - register/unregister a client ID, - stream latency records for aggregation.

Tracks current and maximum connections via CountConnections and forwards records to an SbmRegistry for queueing/processing.
